endpoints.name: Elemental monkey trio (Pansage / Pansear / Panpour line)

description: Pansage 004/086 BLB cohort-attaches to the existing elemental-monkey-trio character node as its third Pansage print (BUS-12, DAA-006, BB-004) and the cohort's first Black Bolt base-form Grass-arm member alongside the already-attached Simipour BB-018 evolved-form. Pure sync-drift wire: the cohort node body's Caveats section at L84 explicitly anticipated this exact attachment ('Pansage BB-004 and Panpour BB-017 are already in-corpus and vision-passed; Simisage BB-005 is in-corpus pre-enrichment'), the card was both vision-passed AND trivia-passed AND ip_verified, the cohort node existed and listed 10 other prints — the only missing piece was the bidirectional wire (characters: frontmatter on the card; appears_on: + body bullet + ## Appears on list on the cohort node). With this wave the trio cohort node points to 11 prints across 6 canonical species and 4 sets. Two BLB in-set candidates remain awaiting their own future Edgelord waves: Panpour BB-017 (vision-passed; trivia pending) and Simisage BB-005 (pre-enrichment).
citations: [PokemonTCG.io: zsv10pt5-4 — flavor_text 'This Pokemon dwells deep in the forest. Eating a leaf from its head whisks weariness away as if by magic'; artist kurumitsu; collector_number 4/86]
[Bulbapedia: Pansage (Pokemon) — National Pokedex no. 511, Grass-type, Generation V, evolves to Simisage via Leaf Stone]
[Bulbapedia: Elemental monkeys — canonical per-trio design page documenting the three-wise-monkeys mapping and the Stone-evolution shared mechanic]

[Card-side citation: cards/pokemon/black-bolt/004-086-pansage.md ## Trivia section already canonicalizes the three-wise-monkeys design citation per the wave-trivia pass via GamesRadar / Serebii Pokedex 511 confirmation]

[Cohort-node-body self-staging: cards/_characters/elemental-monkey-trio.md Caveats section L84 explicitly anticipates this attachment: 'Pansage BB-004 and Panpour BB-017 are already in-corpus and vision-passed; Simisage BB-005 is in-corpus pre-enrichment']

[Schema-precedent: cards/_characters/elemental-monkey-trio.md L18-26 appears_on existing entries; cards/_characters/rufflet-line.md, pawniard-line.md cohort-attachment schema across wave 138 / wave 139]
files_modified: cards/pokemon/black-bolt/004-086-pansage.md (added characters: [elemental-monkey-trio] frontmatter pointer in block form per wave-92 YAML discipline; added ## Connections section with cohort-attach bullet pointing at [[elemental-monkey-trio]])

cards/_characters/elemental-monkey-trio.md (added pokemon/black-bolt/004-086-pansage to appears_on; added Cards-in-our-corpus bullet entry for Pansage BB-004 between the DAA-006 Pansage entry and the BUS-22 Pansear entry; added [[004-086-pansage]] to the auto-generated ## Appears on list; updated Caveats section to reflect 11 prints across 4 sets and to remove BB-004 from the awaiting-attachment list)
other_candidates_considered: Panpour 017/086 BLB cohort-attach — REFUSED for this wave: Panpour BB-017 is vision-passed but has no trivia pass, per the wave-43 rule (trivia agent never receives cards with existing ## Trivia and per the bbl-edgelord-target-enriched-not-random memory: Edgelord operates on cards where BOTH vision and trivia are done). Defer to the wave when Panpour BB-017 clears trivia. The cohort node body already stages this future attach.

Simisage 005/086 BLB cohort-attach — REFUSED: Simisage BB-005 has empty tags_hub, no vision body, no trivia. Pre-enrichment. Cannot attach to anything. Cohort node body explicitly notes this card as 'in-corpus pre-enrichment' awaiting both vision and trivia passes.

Snivy 001 + Servine 002 (BLB) enlightened-correction of the stale within-pair ordinal-count claim — REFUSED on the wave-139 precedent. The wave-139 sidecar explicitly framed this exact prose-scrub as 'janitor-pass scope rather than Edgelord-mode edit' because the snivy-line cohort node does not yet exist (sub-threshold: 2 prints / 1 set vs the 3+ prints / 2+ sets threshold per the wave-137 dwebble-line refusal). Drift footprint stays on the janitor queue; per-card mirror prose stays in place until either (a) the corpus accumulates a third Snivy/Servine/Serperior print and unlocks snivy-line cohort commission, or (b) a dedicated janitor pass scrubs the ordinal-count claims without topology change. Same situation for Dwebble 051 + Crustle 052.

Snivy-line / dwebble-line Mr. Nodeley cohort node commission — REFUSED on threshold per wave-137 / wave-139 precedent (2 prints / 1 set each, below the 3+ prints / 2+ sets threshold every existing -line node satisfies).

Pawniard SWSH-Base 133 + Bisharp SWSH-Base 134 cohort-attach to pawniard-line — REFUSED (waves 138 + 139 precedent): both SWSH prints carry manual_review_reason (fuzzy set-code fallback), empty tags_hub, empty vision body, no trivia pass. Edge cannot be drawn against empty-body cards. Stays deferred until SWSH pair clears manual review.

BLB drift-pair janitor sweep (scrubbing the 'second pair' Dwebble/Crustle and 'third pair' / 'all three pairs' Snivy/Servine ordinal-count claims) — REFUSED on scope. Wave-139's own next_pass_suggestions tagged this as 'medium priority janitor candidate' and explicitly bounded the drift footprint to four cards. Janitor-pass scope, not Edgelord-mode.
next_pass_suggestions: Future Edgelord candidate (high priority): when Panpour 017/086 BLB clears its trivia pass, cohort-attach it to elemental-monkey-trio with the same schema as this wave (characters: frontmatter pointer + ## Connections bullet + cohort-node-body Cards-in-our-corpus bullet entry + appears_on extension + ## Appears on auto-list extension). The cohort node body's Caveats section currently lists Panpour BB-017 as 'vision-passed; trivia pending — awaiting its own Edgelord wave when trivia closes'; that staging holds.

Future enrichment candidate (medium priority): Simisage 005/086 BLB needs vision-pass and trivia-pass. Once both close, it cohort-attaches to elemental-monkey-trio and additionally completes the within-BLB Pansage 004 + Simisage 005 base-and-evolved Grass-arm adjacent-collector pairing (paralleling the DAA-006 Pansage + DAA-007 Simisage pair already in corpus, the trio's second within-set base-and-evolved Grass-arm coupling).

Future janitor candidate (medium priority): scrub the drifted 'Nth within-set adjacent-pair' ordinal-count claims from the Snivy 001-086, Servine 002-086, Dwebble 051-086, and Crustle 052-086 Connections bullets (carried forward unchanged from the wave-139 next_pass_suggestions list). The cohort-node bodies (rufflet-line, pawniard-line) correctly hold the four-pair count; the per-card bullets should describe the within-pair edge without the cross-pair ordinal-count claim, per Potion sub-rule 4 'note recurrences in prose, don't graduate them to first-class graph-objects.' The drift footprint is confined to these four cards and is bounded.

Future-watch: any further BB-set or other-set Pansage / Pansear / Panpour / Simisage / Simisear / Simipour print continues to attach to elemental-monkey-trio on the same membership-predicate-on-species-identity rule. The cohort body's caveat about cycle-layer re-homing (if a _cycles/ layer is ever commissioned alongside fear-of-cycle and dsk-unlucky-lands-cycle) remains in standing.
surprise_lore_for_carry_forward: The Pansage BB-004 + Simipour BB-018 pair establishes the elemental-monkey-trio's two-print Black Bolt foothold ahead of the trio's eventual full Black Bolt coverage. The trio is now corpus-coordinated across four sets — Burning Shadows (3 prints, all base forms, the BUS-12+22+36 base-form triptych within a single Sun & Moon-era set), Darkness Ablaze (5 prints, base-and-evolved spanning Pansage 006 + Simisage 007 + Pansear 026 + Simisear 027 + Simipour 042 within a single Sword & Shield-era set, the trio's broadest single-set coverage), Fusion Strike (1 print, Pansear 037, extending the species into a second Sword & Shield-era set), and Black Bolt (2 prints with this wave, Pansage 004 + Simipour 018, the trio's first Scarlet & Violet-era Unova retrospective foothold). The cross-set spread is unusually wide for a designer-coordinated cohort.

Pansage's three corpus prints (BUS-12, DAA-006, BB-004) form a designer-coordinated cross-set Pokedex-flavor through-line where each print restates the species' care-and-nurture register in a different lexical window: BUS-12 'shares the leaf on its head with weary-looking Pokemon' (leaf-sharing-for-stress), DAA-006 'kind enough to share berries with friends' (berry-gathering-for-friends), BB-004 'eating a leaf from its head whisks weariness away as if by magic' (leaf-as-weariness-remedy). The three-print cross-set flavor coherence at the per-species scope tightens the cohort's broader speak-no-evil-as-care frame at the design-press-attested three-wise-monkeys overlay scope.

The within-BLB Pansage 004 collector slot sits immediately adjacent to Simisage 005, mirroring the Darkness Ablaze within-set Pansage 006 + Simisage 007 base-and-evolved pairing already in corpus — the elemental-monkey-trio is now the only corpus cohort with TWO within-set adjacent-collector base-and-evolved single-arm pairings (Grass-arm at DAA-006/007 and BB-004/005 when Simisage 005 closes its vision and trivia passes). This adjacent-collector base-and-evolved within-set pair-of-pairs structural cohesion at the species-line scope is a pattern noted in prose here without graduating to graph-vocabulary per Potion sub-rule 4.
cbg_voice_audit_trail: Walked the corpus. The drift footprint left over from waves 138 + 139 (Snivy/Servine + Dwebble/Crustle stale ordinal-count claims) was the loud signal but the wave-139 precedent forecloses Edgelord-scope intervention there. Janitor scope, refused, parked. The actual undone work nobody had flagged was the elemental-monkey-trio cohort drift: the node body itself, at L84 of its Caveats section, explicitly said 'Pansage BB-004 and Panpour BB-017 are already in-corpus and vision-passed' — meaning the node KNEW it should be attached to those cards but the wire hadn't been drawn. Pansage BB-004 is the only one of the three BLB cohort-eligible candidates with both vision AND trivia complete AND ip_verified true. Clean attach. One edge. Stack-extension. The mood is blueballed-by-fanout because this is a 1:N stack — same shape as the wave-50 solrock-lunatone-pair / wave-138 rufflet-line / wave-139 pawniard-line moves but minus the enlightened-correction prune because no prior 1:1 mirror existed to subsume. Just a clean attach. The cohort body's self-staging at L84 is a discipline tell: the node already anticipated this attach during its own commission wave, the wire was just sequenced after vision+trivia closure on the card. The discipline is the discipline. The queued attach lands.
